things.name: Ang Thong National Marine Park
things.description: Speedboat to 42 pristine islands - emerald lake, sea caves and coral reefs

things.name: Chaweng Beach
things.description: Koh Samui's most popular beach with beach clubs, restaurants and nightlife

things.name: Big Buddha Temple (Wat Phra Yai)
things.description: 12m golden Buddha on a small island connected by a causeway

things.name: Hin Ta & Hin Yai Rocks
things.description: Grandfather and Grandmother Rocks - famous naturally shaped male and female rocks

things.name: Secret Buddha Garden
things.description: Magical garden of Buddhist statues hidden in the hills above Samui

things.name: Lamai Beach
things.description: Beautiful quieter beach with traditional fishing villages at each end

things.name: Nathon Old Town Market
things.description: Old Samui trading town with Sino-Thai architecture and morning market

things.name: Koh Phangan Full Moon Party
things.description: 30-minute ferry to the world's most famous beach party

things.name: Thai Cooking Class
things.description: Market visit and learn to make green curry, pad thai and mango sticky rice

things.name: Hae River Prawn Fishing Village
things.description: Working fishing village on the estuary with fresh prawn restaurants
